---
name: New app
about: Propose a new app under apps/
title: "new app: <name>"
labels: ["new-app"]
---

### What

One-line summary.

### Why now

What's the immediate use case? Who's the first user?

### Shape

- Runtime: SvelteKit / FastAPI / Rust / static / other?
- Owner: @
- Deploy target: subdomain / port / tailscale-only / public?
- Dependencies on existing apps or packages?

### Naming

- Workspace name: `@petalnet/<slug>`
- Directory: `apps/<slug>/`
